description_long: This object consists of a green plastic crate containing multiple dark green glass bottles, each with a Heineken label and a metal cap. The crate features two rectangular handholds on the shorter sides and a large Heineken logo with a red star on the longer sides. Two bottles are positioned outside the crate, one standing upright and the other lying on its side, both clearly displaying the Heineken branding. The crate appears sturdy and is designed to securely hold the bottles in place, with the tops of the bottles visible above the rim. The bottles themselves are slender, with a long neck and a slightly wider base, typical of beer bottles. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage or wear, and the colors are vibrant and distinct.
description: A green Heineken-branded crate holds several dark green glass bottles, with two bottles placed outside the crate. The crate and bottles are clean, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crate's handhold and the tops of the bottles neatly arranged inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large Heineken logo and two bottles outside the crate, one upright and one lying down.
description_view_2: Rear view with the crate's handhold and two bottles outside, one standing and one on its side, both showing the Heineken label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Heineken logo and a single bottle outside the crate, standing upright.
attribute_label_or_branding: Heineken logo with a red star and green text on the crate and bottle labels; white and green label with red accents on the bottles.
